message: feat: add post-tool-use.sh hook (buffers ToolCallItem to session state)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,125 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# post-tool-use.sh — PostToolUse hook (async)
+# Buffers one ToolCallItem into session state. No cxdb write happens here.
+# stop.sh flushes all buffered tool calls as one AssistantTurn per turn.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+# Note: no resolve_cxdb_url — this script makes no HTTP calls.
+
+input=$(cat)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+context_id=$(get_context_id "$session_id")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+tool_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // ""')
+# Compact-encode tool_input as a string (ToolCallItem.Args is type string in Go)
+args_str=$(echo "$input" | jq -c '.tool_input // {}')
+duration_ms=$(echo "$input" | jq '.duration_ms // 0')
+is_error=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_result.is_error // false')
+tool_use_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_use_id // ""')
+
+# Generate ID if not provided by Claude Code
+if [ -z "$tool_use_id" ]; then
+  tool_use_id=$(python3 -c "import uuid; print(str(uuid.uuid4()))" 2>/dev/null \
+    || node -e "const {randomUUID}=require('crypto');console.log(randomUUID())" 2>/dev/null \
+    || echo "tool-$(date +%s%N)")
+fi
+
+# Synthesize human-readable description
+case "$tool_name" in
+  Read)
+    file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
+    desc="Reading \`${file_path}\`"
+    ;;
+  Write)
+    file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
+    desc="Writing \`${file_path}\`"
+    ;;
+  Edit)
+    file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
+    desc="Editing \`${file_path}\`"
+    ;;
+  Bash)
+    cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | head -c 60)
+    desc="Running \`${cmd}\`"
+    ;;
+  Glob)
+    pattern=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.pattern // ""')
+    desc="Globbing \`${pattern}\`"
+    ;;
+  Grep)
+    pattern=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.pattern // ""')
+    desc="Searching for \`${pattern}\`"
+    ;;
+  Task)
+    task_desc=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""' | head -c 80)
+    desc="Spawning agent: ${task_desc}"
+    ;;
+  WebFetch)
+    url=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.url // ""')
+    desc="Fetching \`${url}\`"
+    ;;
+  WebSearch)
+    query=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.query // ""')
+    desc="Searching web for \`${query}\`"
+    ;;
+  *)
+    desc="\`${tool_name}\`"
+    ;;
+esac
+
+# Build ToolCallItem based on success/error
+if [ "$is_error" = "true" ]; then
+  error_msg=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_result.content // ""')
+  exit_code=$(echo "$input" | jq '.tool_result.exit_code // null')
+
+  tool_call=$(jq -n \
+    --arg id "$tool_use_id" \
+    --arg name "$tool_name" \
+    --arg args "$args_str" \
+    --arg desc "$desc" \
+    --arg errmsg "$error_msg" \
+    --argjson exit_code "$exit_code" \
+    --argjson duration_ms "$duration_ms" \
+    '{
+      "id": $id,
+      "name": $name,
+      "args": $args,
+      "status": "error",
+      "description": $desc,
+      "duration_ms": $duration_ms,
+      "error": {
+        "message": $errmsg,
+        "exit_code": $exit_code
+      }
+    }')
+else
+  content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_result.content // ""')
+  exit_code=$(echo "$input" | jq '.tool_result.exit_code // null')
+
+  tool_call=$(jq -n \
+    --arg id "$tool_use_id" \
+    --arg name "$tool_name" \
+    --arg args "$args_str" \
+    --arg desc "$desc" \
+    --arg content "$content" \
+    --argjson exit_code "$exit_code" \
+    --argjson duration_ms "$duration_ms" \
+    '{
+      "id": $id,
+      "name": $name,
+      "args": $args,
+      "status": "complete",
+      "description": $desc,
+      "duration_ms": $duration_ms,
+      "result": {
+        "content": $content,
+        "success": true,
+        "exit_code": $exit_code
+      }
+    }')
+fi
+
+buffer_tool_call "$session_id" "$tool_call" || true
+exit 0
